title: phyllanthus ovalifolius
intro: Phyllanthus ovalifolius, also known as the green gold or green gold of India, is a type of flowering plant in the family Phyllanthaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Phyllanthus ovalifolius include its ability to support liver health, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of jaundice. Phyllanthus ovalifolius can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as decoctions, infusions, and extracts, which are used in traditional medicine to treat a range of health conditions.
